MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Motion for an Order Holding Judgment Debtors in Contempt, Compelling Responses to Questions Posed at Debtors Examination and Compelling Production Of Documents, and for an Order Extending Examination Liens.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Robert E. White, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Clearpoint Investment Management, LP.
Defendant Cary Grant, Jr., was present in pro per as an individual defendant and in his capacity as President of defendant Premo Media, Inc.
Judgment in favor of plaintiff Clearpoint Investment Management, LP, and against defendants Cary Grant, Jr. and Premo Media, Inc., was filed on May 23, 2018.
Amended Judgment in favor of plaintiff Clearpoint Investment Management, LP, and against defendants Cary Grant, Jr. and Premo Media, Inc., was filed on May 23, 2018.
Proof of Service Order of Examination on file. OEX personally served on defendants on 11/8/18.
Bench Letter issued 3/5/19.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules as follows:

(1) Defendant Cary Grant, Jr. does not have sufficient legal grounds to refuse to answer plaintiff's questions;
(2) Defendant Cary Grant, Jr. will provide the Court and plaintiff's counsel with his mailing address*, forthwith;
(3) Defendant Cary Grant, Jr. will produce the requested documents and answer the questions posed by plaintiff at the prior Order of Examination no later than October 15, 2020. Failure to respond and produce documents will result in the issuance of an Order to Show Cause re: Contempt; and
(4) Examination Liens will be extended to October 8, 2021.

Matter is CONTINUED to Thursday, October 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Department for Progress Report on defendants' complaince with today's orders. Defendant Cary Grant, Jr. is ORDERED present at the October 17th hearing date. Failure to appear will result in defendant Cary Grant, Jr. being held in Contempt of Court.

Lastly, the Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to conduct a brief OEX with Mr. Grant in order to obtain general information from the latter. Formal Order of Examination of defendants Cary Grant, Jr. and Premo Media, Inc. is CONTINUED Wednesday, December 30, 2020 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 514.

*Mr. Grant's mailing address is 1212 Broadway Plaza, 2nd Floor, Walnut Creek, CA 94596.
